raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a light fixture from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. The price was {$280.00}. It took several weeks for it to arrive and then I had to schedule a contractor to install it. When it was finally installed, to would not work as one on the light receptacles did not work. When I complained to the seller they would not help. So, I asked Citi to file a dispute but they sided with the seller because they only had a 7 day window for a claim to be filed. In this case it was very difficult to get fit installed that quickly because I didn't know when it was coming, it was lost on the final leg of delivery ( from the shipped to the USPS ) and when to did finally get to me, I had to schedule it to be installed. So, it was longer than the 7 day window to find out it was broken. 

I'd like to have Citi understand the issue and support my dispute given the actual circumstances. 

Thanks.
